flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Albion College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 8 pp at Albion College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (57.1% vs 65.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Albion College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).
